title: Ability to configure work schedule at individual board level
excerpt:

posts.author: GavinHenry (Gavin)
posts.cookedHtml:
This appears to be configurable at a Global level, meaning work scheduled (i.e. monday to friday) will apply to all boards

However, we have a requirement to configure this on individual boards which is used for workstreams that cover a Monday-Sunday work schedule
